topLevers.title: Reduce Food Cost
topLevers.action: Renegotiate dairy supplier contract — you're paying 8% above market rate

topLevers.title: Optimize Labor
topLevers.action: Shift 2 part-time staff to lunch shift where demand is 40% lower

topLevers.action: Raise 4 high-demand low-margin pasta dishes by $1.50
